title: Credit Score — Construction Loan Ready
summary: Hit a credit score that secures the best construction loan terms for Deal 1. Most construction lenders want 720+; best rates open up at 760+. Target 760+ by October 2026 so Deal 1 financing isn't constrained.

phases.label: Pull current scores from all 3 bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)
Dispute any errors, freeze unauthorized inquiries

action_items.label: Confirm utilization < 30% on all revolving lines
Avoid opening new credit lines 6 months before Deal 1 application
Get a credit-monitoring tool (Credit Karma free or Experian premium)

risks: Hard inquiries from shopping loans can dip score 5-10 points. Cluster all lender shopping in a 14-day window so FICO counts them as one. Riley legal could trigger a collection or judgment that wrecks score — close that loop before it escalates.
notes: Max to fill in current score and target lender's minimum once known.
